title: arctostaphylos glandulosa var. howellii
intro: Arctostaphylos glandulosa var. howellii, also known as Howell's manzanita, is a variety of the evergreen manzanita shrub native to the coastal mountains of California. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Howell's manzanita include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
